title: PvpRoom
description: This plugin is for creating a room dedicated to fighting between two or more people.
body:
### PvpRoom – The Ultimate Minecraft PvP Arena Plugin
This plugin is for creating a room dedicated to fighting between two or more people.
PvpRoom allows you to create dedicated battle arena where players can engage in intense one-on-one duels or group fights. With customizable settings, automated matchmaking, and seamless integration, this plugin is perfect for any server looking to enhance its PvP experience. Whether you want friendly sparring matches or competitive tournaments, PvpRoom provides everything you need to set up the ultimate combat zone! ## Features: ✅ Create and manage PvP arenas easily
✅ Support for both 1v1 and team fights
Take your PvP battles to the next level with PvpRoom! # Commands: **/pvproom info** : To Get Plugin Info
**/pvproom help** : To Show Help Message
**/pvproom selector** : To Get Selector Item
**/pvproom select door __** : To Select The Door
**/pvproom select room __** : To Select The Room
**/pvproom status on** : To Enable The Plugin
**/pvproom status off** : To DisableThe Plugin
**/pvproom settings** : To Show Settings Gui
**/pvproom create __** : Create A New Room
**/pvproom remove __** : Remove A Room
# Info Plugin By : MrLejen

Tored Developer: https://discord.gg/8s8XBz4RUG
Discord : @MrLejen
